productDisplayName: Peter England Men Statements Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11.5 cm X 9.6 cmHas two main compartmentsFour credit card slots on the left sideTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideOne buttoned pocket on the right sideBrand name embossed on the top and on the buttoned pocketCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
